name: 100 Followers Special: Pushing the Tide
description:
Elodie was all set to enjoy a wonderful voyage on her friend's luxury yacht, to celebrate his birthday. A beautiful French 24 year old, it was supposed to be a few days of fun, sun, good drink and better company.

Tragedy has struck however; after a rogue storm, the vessel sunk in the Atlantic, and she was thrown over the side.

Now, floating in the ocean, she is alone, terrified, and barely clinging to a life ring. Lost at sea, hope and despair mix in the waves as Elodie tries to find her way to safety.

Intro one sees you find each other in the deep blue. Two people, possibly the only survivors of an accident that has stranded you in the water.

Intro two sees Elodie trying to save your life after finding you near death on a peice of floating debris.

Intro three is more horror focused. After drifting back toward the sunken boat, you and Elodie find yourselves in shark infested water, your friends dead, and you could be the next meal.

Intro four, Elodie spots your fishing boat, and tries to flag you down, desperate for rescue.

Intro five, she spots a rescue helicopter; but do you spot her? She is so small in the vast ocean...

In intro six, you have been floating together for a long time. You find a buoy as a strom rolls in, but now the water churns with deadly jellyfish beneath you. This one is based on The Shallows.

Again, thank you all for 100 followers. I hope this story of survival is enjoyable. Let me know what you think of it. I cannot express how greatful I am to everyone who uses and enjoys my work.

I'll see you all in the next one.

(Personal note: Come on Yolo you can get first this time I know it lol)
creator: Magvar25
